provisioning.supplyManifest: pinned commit/version/sha256, fetch-once cache, checksum-verified, fail-closed (Phase 1 ~/.ioi/vm-toolchain pattern)
provisioning.proxy: lease-authenticated WebSocket proxy: first-message session token -> principal -> raw forward; expiry/revoke/receipts; fail-closed

notes: Browser-served VS Code over the same source-controlled vscode-extension module. Reproducible OSS openvscode-server runtime (NOT a permitted host-gap); served against the running Environment as a normal editor_access_service. The concrete proof that the generic editor/access model is real.
